name: RIDERTA.COM
message: [AI generated] RIDERTA.COM refers to the website of the Greater Cleveland Regional Transit Authority (GCRTA or RTA), based in Ohio, USA. It provides public transportation services including bus, paratransit, light/heavy rail transit within Cuyahoga County. Its services help individuals commute around the Cleveland area. On its website, users can access schedules, service updates, fare details, and more.
